expectations.text: Recommends voyage-code-3 (not voyage-4-large or other generals)
Mentions Matryoshka or dimension-flexibility (1024 default, can truncate)
expectations.evidence: 'voyage-code-3 is Matryoshka, so you can truncate to 256, 512, or extend to 2048'

expectations.text: Surfaces input_type document/query asymmetry (the silent-bug gotcha)
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section 'The thing you didn't ask about: input_type' calling it the #1 silent bug

expectations.text: Notes Voyage requires a standard (not integrated) Pinecone index
expectations.evidence: 'voyage-code-3 is not an integrated Pinecone embedder, so you embed client-side and upsert vectors to a standard index'
